title: 3D Mob Totem
body:
How to use:

Use anvil rename totem to 3D + mob name

Example:

"3D Zombie"
![zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dc40f9bb1277750d5d328819e489e51e5496df3.png)

"3D Glow Squid"
![glow squid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15786ced53ca5bd6b6b55a5ed01bc4b229d11a50.png)

If you have an idea or see an error, please report it to me at [report](https://github.com/quangei/Resource-pack/issues)
